rank_math_title: Scorpio December 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Scorpio December 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Moonstone). New Moon Dec 7 in Sagittarius (2nd house of money); Cold Full Moon Dec 24 in Cancer (9th house of belief).
content:
Scorpio December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeReflect on what you're worth, celebrate the long view
Key DatesNew Moon Dec 7 (Sagittarius, 2nd house) / Jupiter retrograde Dec 12 / Cold Full Moon Dec 24 (Cancer, 9th house)
Love2nd house New Moon refreshes self-worth; the Cold Moon lights belief and the bigger picture
Career2nd house New Moon is a money reset; Capricorn season Dec 21 stabilizes communication work
Crystal of the MonthMoonstone
Lucky ColorsDeep silver, charcoal, pearl white
Lucky Number2
AffirmationI release the old price I accepted; I widen the view of what is possible.

This Month's Energy

Scorpio, December 2026 closes the year moving from worth to meaning. The New Moon in Sagittarius on December 7 falls in your 2nd house of money, income, possessions, and self-worth — a fresh start in what you earn and what you believe you deserve. Then Jupiter turns retrograde on December 12 at 27°01' Leo (your 10th house), slowing a career expansion and inviting a review of public direction. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 lands in your 9th house of belief, travel, study, and the long view — a wide, philosophical close. December's pattern: face the worth early, widen the view late.

Key Dates for Scorpio in December 2026

DateTransitMeaning for ScorpioDo / Avoid
Dec 7New Moon in Sagittarius (your 2nd house)Fresh start in money, income, possessions, self-worthDo: set a new worth-standard, renegotiate a price, audit earnings
Avoid: accepting the old price out of habit
Dec 12Jupiter turns retrograde in Leo (your 10th house)A career or public-role expansion pauses; review the direction you've been climbing towardDo: audit the title, refine the public role, re-read the ambition
Avoid: launching a major new public identity before February 2027
Dec 15Venus post-retrograde shadow endsLove and money conversations clarify; the deep water settlesDo: commit to the value, finalize the financial plan
Avoid: re-opening old worth-debates
Dec 21Sun enters Capricorn (your 3rd house)Capricorn season stabilizes communication, writing, teaching through JanuaryDo: commit to the message, refine the writing, mend close ties
Avoid: vague communication when precision is being asked for
Dec 24Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 9th house)Belief, travel, study, publishing, the long view illuminated; a philosophical culminationDo: name the 2027 direction, plan the study or trip, claim the worldview
Avoid: staying in the small story when the sky asks for the big one
Dec 31Year-end thresholdNatural review — what 2026 taught about worth and meaningDo: name the worth you claimed, the view you widened
Avoid: rushing into January without the audit complete

Career & Money

For Scorpio, December's money story is about self-worth. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 2nd house of income and possessions — but for Scorpio, money and self-worth are inseparable. The old price you accepted in 2026 can be renegotiated now.

Jupiter retrograde in your 10th house of career from December 12 — audit the title and direction you've been climbing toward. Does this ambition still fit? Capricorn season (your 3rd house) from December 21 stabilizes communication, writing, and teaching. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 9th house) on December 24 widens the view — the long view of direction. Crystals for wealth can support the audit; the practical move is face the worth early, widen the view late.

Love & Relationships

The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 2nd house of self-worth. For Scorpio, this is the relationship signature of the month: what you accept in love mirrors what you believe you deserve. If a bond has been quietly undervaluing you, this New Moon names it.

Venus finishes her post-retrograde shadow on December 15 — and as a water sign ruled by Pluto (and traditionally Mars), you feel the deep water of this settling. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 9th house) on December 24 widens love into the bigger picture — shared worldview, shared meaning, shared direction. Crystals for love can support the bond; the deeper practice is release the old price, then meet the other from claimed worth.

Health & Wellness

December asks Scorpio to release and widen. The 2nd house Sagittarius New Moon audits what you carry (body and resources), while the 9th house Cancer Cold Moon pulls you into the long view. Pluto/Mars-ruled Scorpio carries tension in the reproductive organs, pelvis, and lower abdomen — held grief and old worth-wounds land here.

Moonstone, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with emotional balance, lunar cycles, feminine energy, and release — a useful symbolic companion for fluid processing. Pelvic-floor awareness, hip-opening stretches, warm baths, and actual grief-processing (not just deep endurance) carry you into January. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Moonstone

Why Moonstone fits Scorpio this month. You are Pluto/Mars-ruled and December asks you to do two things at once: release the old price (2nd house) and widen the view (9th house). Moonstone — traditionally tied to lunar cycles, emotional release, intuition, and new beginnings — is the stone that moves Scorpio's fixed water without breaking the depth. Where Obsidian would protect and Malachite would transform, Moonstone flows: pearlescent, fluid, with a water-sign kinship for slow release. Perfect for the 2nd house Sagittarius New Moon (worth) and the 9th house Cancer Cold Moon (long view).

How to use it during December 2026. Place Moonstone on your nightstand or in your wallet/purse on December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Carry it in your pocket from December 15 onward (Venus post-shadow clearing).

Best date to use it: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer — hold Moonstone over your sacral or heart center for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming one old price you're releasing and one new direction you're claiming.

Read more: Moonstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Scorpio.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Scorpio — December 2026

When: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 9th house).
Crystal: Moonstone.
Intention: Release the old price; widen the view.

  1. Cleanse Moonstone in salt water or moonlight on the night of December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Place it on your wallet, purse, or wherever money lives.
  2. Set the intention in the two weeks between the New Moon and the Cold Moon (December 7–24): write down one old price you accepted in 2026 that you will not accept again — and one direction you want to widen toward in 2027.
  3. Act at the Cold Full Moon on December 24: hold Moonstone over your sacral or heart center, speak aloud the old price you're releasing and the new direction you're claiming. Then make one concrete move (a price change, a conversation, a course enrollment).
  4. Reflect at the Scorpio New Moon in November 2027 (your 1st house): how has the release matured? Hold Moonstone during the review.

Shop Scorpio Crystals for December 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with protection, transformation, emotional depth, and intuition — including the Moonstone that moves fixed water through a release-and-widen month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Scorpio December 2026

Is December 2026 a good month for Scorpio?

It's a worth-and-meaning month. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your 2nd house) refreshes money and self-worth. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 (your 9th house) widens the long view.

How will the Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 affect Scorpio?

It falls in your 2nd house of income, possessions, and self-worth — a fresh start in what you earn and what you believe you deserve. Renegotiate the old price.

What does the Cold Moon in Cancer on December 24 mean for Scorpio?

It falls in your 9th house of belief, travel, study, and the long view — a philosophical culmination. Name the 2027 direction; plan the study or trip; claim the worldview.

How does Jupiter retrograde (Dec 12) affect Scorpio?

Jupiter retrogrades in your 10th house of career and public role. A professional expansion pauses; audit the title and direction you've been climbing toward rather than launching a new public identity.

What is the best crystal for Scorpio in December 2026?

Moonstone — it moves fixed water through release and widening, exactly what a 2nd house Sagittarius New Moon plus a 9th house Cancer Cold Moon demand. See the full Scorpio crystal guide →
